'''Bahalian Shipyards''' was a small, well-respected [[Starship/Legends|shipwright company]] located in the [[Astal sector/Legends|Astal sector]]. It was a front for the [[Tenloss Syndicate/Legends|Tenloss Syndicate]], and it was at the Bahalian Shipyards that the prototype for the [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunter]], the ''[[Onyx Star]]'', was produced.

{{Company-stub}}
